# RecoveryCommander

> Professional Windows System Recovery & Maintenance Tool — open-source, modular, Windows 11-styled.

## What it does

RecoveryCommander is a free, open-source desktop application for diagnosing and repairing Windows 10/11 systems. It provides a single dashboard for over 60 system tools organized into pluggable recovery modules.

## Core modules

- **DISM** — CheckHealth, ScanHealth, RestoreHealth, StartComponentCleanup
- **SFC** — System File Checker with real-time progress
- **REAgentC** — Windows Recovery Environment configuration
- **Diagnostics** — Memory diagnostics and disk health checks
- **Utilities** — Activation tools, network optimization, cleanup (BleachBit, Recuva, UniGetUI, EaseUS Partition Master, and more)
- **System Prep** — Pre-recovery preparation tasks
- **Malware Removal** — Integrated scanning and removal tools
- **Driver Manager** — Driver backup, restore, and update
- **Cloud Recovery** — Secure cloud-based recovery image downloads

## Technical details

- **Platform**: Windows 10/11 (x64)
- **Framework**: .NET 10, WinForms with Windows 11 Mica theming
- **Architecture**: Plugin-based modular system with dynamic module loading
- **License**: Open source — see GitHub repository
- **Current version**: 1.2.6

## Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/pauluk83/RecoveryCommander
- Releases: https://github.com/pauluk83/RecoveryCommander/releases
